name: US Trust Credit Repair LLC.
description_short: US Trust Credit Repair LLC disputes negative items and errors on credit reports through certified mail to creditors and credit bureaus, with no upfront fees and monthly pricing starting at $100–$150.
description_long:
US Trust Credit Repair LLC is a credit repair company founded by Christopher Yates, who brings over 25 years of experience in finance, law, and small business lending. The firm operates offices in Miami and Los Angeles with nationwide service via toll-free line (800-526-2975) and maintains surety bonding through Ameripro (Bond #72B5BIH9644).

The company specializes in disputing inaccurate and erroneous information on credit reports across multiple account types. Services include private assessment, creditor contact on behalf of clients, documentation exchange, preparation of dispute letters tailored to specific debts, direct negotiation with credit bureaus and creditors, and debt validation. They offer seven rounds of disputes structured as a 5-month program with months 6–7 complimentary. Service categories include unsecured/secured personal loans and credit card late payments (typically $100–$150/month), as well as higher-complexity cases like mortgage foreclosures, repossessions, judgments, and bankruptcies (priced per consultation).

The company distinguishes itself through claims of transparency, specifically highlighting posted actual results in writing and a no-advance-fee structure where work is completed before payment is due. They emphasize legal knowledge (referencing trained teams of attorneys and paralegals), aggressive expectation management, and educational components (teaching consumers their rights). Marketing materials stress crisis management availability and experience with 15 years in unsecured and secured debt.

However, prospective clients should note that the website lacks specific case examples, success rates, or regulatory compliance details. Claims about attorney involvement and paralegal services are not substantiated by verifiable credentials. The pricing model (monthly recurring charges) and the assertion that "your credit will not repair itself" reflect standard credit repair industry messaging. Results depend entirely on actual validation and dispute success, which credit repair firms cannot guarantee. Consumers should verify any company's status with state regulatory bodies and understand that many negative items cannot be legally removed.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No advance fees—work is completed before first payment due (5 days after first disputes sent)
Transparent pricing structure disclosed upfront ($100–$150/month typical for basic cases, custom pricing for complex cases)
Seven rounds of disputes included with months 6–7 complimentary
States use of certified mail to creditors to create proof of debt validation requests
Free initial consultation and analysis offered
Multi-office presence (Miami, Los Angeles) with nationwide toll-free service
Surety bonded (Ameripro Bond #72B5BIH9644) providing financial backing
Founder transparency (LinkedIn profile provided; 25+ years stated experience)
cons: Website lacks specific case examples, success rates, or measurable outcome data despite claiming to post 'actual results'
Claims of attorney and paralegal involvement are not independently verifiable or credentialed
No mention of TCPA, FCRA, or state-specific credit repair law compliance; no regulatory credentials listed
Recurring monthly fees ($100–$150+) continue for extended periods with no guarantee of results; many negative items cannot legally be removed
Marketing language ('stop being bullied,' 'holding the leash') uses emotional messaging that may not reflect realistic credit repair outcomes
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative accounts (late payments, charge-offs, collections) who want structured dispute assistance without paying upfront
People with disputed or inaccurate credit report entries who prefer phone-based guidance and professional correspondence
Individuals seeking help validating debt claims and challenging creditor reporting errors across secured and unsecured accounts
diagnosis: US Trust Credit Repair LLC is best suited for consumers with multiple disputed or potentially inaccurate negative items who want to avoid upfront fees and prefer professional representation in dispute correspondence. The primary caveat is that credit repair outcomes depend on actual validation disputes and legal defects in reporting—the company cannot remove accurate, timely negative information, and recurring monthly costs ($100–$150+) may accumulate without guaranteed results.
services: Preparation of customized dispute letters sent via certified mail
Direct contact and negotiation with creditors on client behalf
Direct communication with credit bureaus regarding inaccurate/erroneous information
Dispute rounds (7 total) structured over 5-month program
Credit score analysis identifying highest-impact negative items
Complimentary service months (months 6–7 in basic program)
Custom monthly payment plans and multiple payment methods (ACH, debit card, credit/gift card)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
